vocab.meaning: người thích ở nhà (hơn là đi ra ngoài những nơi ồn ào)
vocab.example: I’m a bit of a home bird on weekends, so I’d much rather stay in a quiet environment than head to a rowdy club.

vocab.meaning: xả hơi, giải tỏa căng thẳng (thường ở những nơi sôi động)
vocab.example: After a grueling week at work, sometimes I need to go to a concert just to let off steam and enjoy the music.

vocab.meaning: lánh xa đám đông xô bồ, náo nhiệt
vocab.example: I prefer hiking in the mountains on Sundays because it’s far from the madding crowd of the city center.

vocab.meaning: im lặng đến mức có thể nghe thấy tiếng kim rơi
vocab.example: I love visiting the central library; it’s so quiet in there that you could hear a pin drop.

vocab.meaning: đi chơi đêm cực kỳ sôi động, quậy tưng bừng
vocab.example: Every now and then, my friends and I like to paint the town red by visiting the most vibrant bars in the district.

vocab.meaning: sự bình yên và tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: All I really want on a Saturday afternoon is a bit of peace and quiet in my backyard with a good book.

vocab.word: at the top of one's lungs
vocab.meaning: hết mức (thường nói về việc la hét/hát hò ở nơi ồn ào)
vocab.example: I avoid karaoke bars because I can't stand people singing at the top of their lungs all night.
Quiet places are essential for me to recharge my batteries before the new work week begins on Monday.

vocab.word: the life and soul of the party
vocab.ipa: /ðə laɪf ənd səʊl əv ðə ˈpɑː.ti/
vocab.meaning: người là linh hồn của bữa tiệc (thích nơi náo nhiệt)
vocab.example: My brother is the life and soul of the party, so he always drags me to the noisiest spots in town.

vocab.meaning: thoát khỏi mọi áp lực, mệt mỏi thường nhật
vocab.example: I choose secluded coastal areas on weekends just to get away from it all and clear my mind.
